name: golang-github-zmap-rc2-dev
title: golang-github-zmap-rc2-dev
description:
RC2 Cipher in Golang
It's a crypto/cipher cipher.Block interface, just like AES.
.
It only works with 64 bidget keys right now.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-zmap-rc2-dev because RC2 Cipher in Golang.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-zmap-rc2-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-zmap-rc2-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-zmap-rc2-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
